sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103748" key="thbe/nneios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τηβένν-ειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n103748.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to Tebennos</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐσθής</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </cit> (citing <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.3</biblScope></bibl>, where <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τημένιον</foreign> codd., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τημένειον</foreign> Kuster).</sense> </entryFree>
